_metadata.description: Apparent bulk density (g/cm3) for all 80 food classes, as-served
_metadata.note: Values represent the cooked/served food item including absorbed oil, syrup, or moisture — NOT dry ingredient density
sources: PMC/Springer: cooked idli bulk density 0.53 g/cm3
FAO/INFOODS Density Database v2.0 (cooked cereals, legumes)
USDA food texture/density literature (eggs, meat, milk)
Food engineering first-principles from ingredient composition

aloo gobi.source: Dry stir-fry: cooked potato (~0.90) + cauliflower (~0.65); composite ~0.80

aloo methi.source: Potato + fenugreek leaves dry sabzi; leaves wilt and add little mass

aloo mutter.source: Potato + peas in thin gravy; wetter than dry sabzi

aloo paratha.source: Stuffed flatbread: dough + potato filling + ghee; denser than plain chapati

amritsari kulcha.source: Leavened stuffed tandoor bread; baking-soda leavening reduces density vs paratha

anda curry.source: Hard-boiled egg density ~1.02 (USDA); egg in curry composite ~1.00

banana chips.source: Dehydrated deep-fried banana slices; moisture removed → crispy ~0.35-0.50

besan laddu.source: Roasted chickpea flour + ghee + sugar; compact sphere — ghee fills pores

bhindi masala.source: Cooked okra hollow structure; bulk density ~0.65-0.80

biryani.source: FAO cooked rice ~1.0; biryani loosely layered with meat/veg → ~0.88

balushahi.source: Flaky layered fried maida donut + sugar glaze; lighter than gulab jamun

boondi laddu.source: Fried boondi balls + sugar syrup; loosely packed with some air gaps

chana masala.source: Cooked chickpeas ~1.0-1.1 in thick gravy; composite ~0.95

chapati.source: Whole-wheat unleavened disc; steam-puffed slightly; 0.65-0.70 range

chicken pizza.source: Pizza base + chicken topping (~1.0); heavier than margherita

chicken wings.source: Bone-in chicken: meat ~1.05, bone ~1.9; whole-wing composite ~0.92

chikki.source: Peanut+jaggery brittle; compressed no-air candy; jaggery ~1.4, peanuts ~0.8

chivda.source: Roasted/fried puffed-rice mix + nuts; very high air content

chole bhature.source: Puffed fried bhature (~0.45) + chickpea curry (~1.0); plated composite ~0.80

dabeli.source: Spiced potato filling in pav bun; chutneys and pomegranate seeds add density

dal khichdi.source: Rice+lentil soft porridge; softer and wetter than biryani

dhokla.source: Besan steamed cake; slightly denser than idli (chickpea flour > rice)

falooda.source: Milk base + basil seeds (hydrated) + rose syrup; denser than plain milk

fish curry.source: Fish muscle density ~1.0 in thin/medium gravy; composite ~0.95

gajar ka halwa.source: Grated carrot cooked down with milk + sugar + ghee; close to water density

garlic bread.source: Western yeast bread crumb (~0.35-0.45) + garlic butter; composite ~0.55

garlic naan.source: Yeast-leavened tandoor bread + butter; softer and less dense than paratha

ghevar.source: Fried disc with honeycomb air pockets + thin syrup; porous structure

grilled sandwich.source: Grilled compressed bread + vegetable/cheese filling; denser than untoasted bread

gujhia.source: Fried maida pastry shell + khoya/dry-fruit filling; crescent shape

gulab jamun.source: Fried khoya ball + ~30% sugar syrup absorption (NCERT vol. calc); >water density

hara bhara kabab.source: Shallow-fried spinach+peas+potato patty; dense mashed vegetable

idiyappam.source: Steamed rice-flour string noodles; very porous extruded structure

idli.source: PMC/Springer study — cooked idli bulk density 0.53 g/cm3

jalebi.source: Fried wheat batter coil + heavy sugar-syrup saturation; syrup density ~1.3-1.4

kaju katli.source: Cashew paste + sugar; compressed flat diamond near-zero air; cashew ~0.8, sugar ~1.6

khakhra.source: Dry-roasted flatbread; all moisture removed → cracker-like

kheer.source: Whole milk (~1.03) + rice + sugar; slightly denser than plain milk

kulfi.source: Dense frozen milk dessert; less airy than western ice cream ~0.90-1.0

margherita pizza.source: Pizza crust (~0.55) + tomato sauce + mozzarella; composite slice ~0.80-0.85

masala dosa.source: Crisp crepe (~0.45) + aloo masala filling (~0.85); area-weighted composite

masala papad.source: Roasted/fried lentil wafer + raw toppings; base wafer very light ~0.25-0.35

medu vada.source: Deep-fried fermented urad dal donut; porous from CO2 + oil-soaked

misal pav.source: Dense sprouted moth bean curry + farsan toppings on pav

modak.source: Thin steamed rice outer shell + coconut-jaggery filling; moderate composite

moong dal halwa.source: Cooked moong dal + ghee + sugar; high fat+sugar content → dense semi-solid

murukku.source: Deep-fried rice+urad spiral; extruded porous structure ~0.40-0.50

mysore pak.source: Besan + ghee + sugar; porous but ghee fills pores; net density ~1.05-1.10

navratan korma.source: Mixed veg + paneer + cream; cream-based sauce moderates density

neer dosa.source: Ultra-thin rice-water crepe; very high surface-to-mass ratio, extremely light

onion pakoda.source: Irregular deep-fried besan batter + onion; oil-absorbed porous structure

palak paneer.source: Spinach puree (~0.85) + paneer (~0.95); creamy curry composite

paneer pizza.source: Pizza base + paneer (~0.95); similar density to chicken pizza

pani puri.source: Hollow fried semolina shell (~0.40) + spiced water filling → composite ~0.68

paniyaram.source: Ball-shaped griddle-cooked idli batter; crust all around traps moisture

papdi chaat.source: Fried wheat crackers + yogurt (~1.05) + chutneys; composite ~0.72

patrode.source: Steamed colocasia-leaf + rice-batter rolls; dense compressed layers

pav bhaji.source: Heavily mashed buttered mixed vegetables; dense homogeneous paste

pepperoni pizza.source: Base + cured pepperoni (~1.0-1.05) + cheese; densest pizza variant

phirni.source: Ground rice pudding; thicker than kheer; semi-solid

poha.source: Flattened rice flakes; puffed/flat structure → one of the lightest cooked foods

pongal.source: Rice + moong dal soft porridge with ghee; moderately dense

puri bhaji.source: Deep-fried puffed puri (~0.40) + potato bhaji (~0.90); composite ~0.75

rajma chawal.source: Cooked kidney beans (~1.1) + rice (~1.0); plated composite ~0.92

rasgulla.source: Spongy chhena ball absorbs light sugar syrup; density slightly >1.0

rava dosa.source: Semolina thin lacy crispy crepe; light structure

sabudana khichdi.source: Cooked tapioca pearls (~1.1 when soaked) + peanuts + potato; composite ~0.88

sabudana vada.source: Deep-fried tapioca+peanut patty; tapioca is dense, oil-absorbed

samosa.source: Fried maida shell + potato filling; oil-soaked; pyramid shape

seekh kebab.source: Cooked ground meat bulk density ~0.90-1.0 g/cm3 (USDA)

set dosa.source: Thick spongy fermented dosa; similar to idli but griddle-set reduces porosity

sev puri.source: Thin papdi base + crispy sev (light) + chutneys

solkadhi.source: Coconut milk + kokum; diluted coconut milk ~1.03 g/cm3

steamed momo.source: Wheat dough wrapper + vegetable/meat filling; denser than fermented items

thali.source: Complete mixed meal average; use individual detection when possible

thukpa.source: Tibetan noodle soup; noodles + broth + vegetables

uttapam.source: Thicker than dosa; griddle-cooked with vegetable toppings

vada pav.source: Fried potato vada (~0.82) in pav bun (~0.55); composite ~0.78
